texto: Do you dance? Or are you strictly a prop-up-the-wall-with-a-beer kind of guy?""I dance. But I don't shag."She laughed. "I think we've just established that you do"."Not Austin Powers shagging. It's A Carolina thing. A dance.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Virginia Kantra que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Do you dance? Or are you strictly a prop-up-the-wall-with-a-beer kind of guy?""I dance. But I don…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, dance, strictly, com foco em humor.
